$schema_comment: ADSK recommended upstream skills — not vendored. Pin and review before enterprise use.

checklist: Install or star signal supports trust
Review SKILL.md and scripts/ for secrets exfiltration

recommended.trust_notes: Full Superpowers tree (includes brainstorming / code-review). For team ADSK adoption prefer optional pack engineering-methods (selective subset + playbook). May assume Superpowers-specific paths (e.g. docs/superpowers/). Pin and adapt paths to your repo layout.

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

recommended.trust_notes: Official Skills CLI discovery helper. Still apply trust checklist before installing anything it suggests.

pin.note: Prefer a known-good CLI/skills release after review.

recommended.trust_notes: Official Anthropic helper for creating and evaluating skills. Aimed at maintainers, not every app developer.
GitHub org (high trust). Guide for Dependabot YAML, grouping, and supply-chain update workflows.

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

recommended.trust_notes: Smaller maintainer (~783 installs on skills.sh). Review SKILL.md before team rollout; complements Dependabot + npm audit CI.

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

optional.trust_notes: Selective Superpowers subset for ADSK engineering-methods pack. Complements SDD; does not replace it. Playbook: docs/engineering-methods.md. Prefer this pack over installing the full Superpowers tree unless you need brainstorming/code-review skills too.
optional.install: npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill writing-plans --skill test-driven-development --skill systematic-debugging -y
optional.install_global: npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill writing-plans --skill test-driven-development --skill systematic-debugging -g -y

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

optional.trust_notes: High-adoption product methodology pack (Cagan / Torres / Mom Test / JTBD). Complements ADSK SDD; does not replace it. Playbook: docs/product-value-loop.md.
optional.install: npx skills add wondelai/skills --skill inspired-product --skill mom-test --skill continuous-discovery --skill jobs-to-be-done -y
optional.install_global: npx skills add wondelai/skills --skill inspired-product --skill mom-test --skill continuous-discovery --skill jobs-to-be-done -g -y

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

optional.trust_notes: High-adoption PM facilitation skills for strategy sessions and outcome roadmaps. Pair with wondelai discovery skills; execute with ADSK spec-driven-workflow.
optional.install: npx skills add deanpeters/product-manager-skills --skill product-strategy-session --skill roadmap-planning --skill prioritization-advisor -y
optional.install_global: npx skills add deanpeters/product-manager-skills --skill product-strategy-session --skill roadmap-planning --skill prioritization-advisor -g -y

optional.trust_notes: Official Anthropic knowledge-work pack. Automated scanners may flag medium risk (research/network behavior). Human-review SKILL.md before team rollout.
High-adoption UI craft skill. Optional for non-UI teams.

examples: other generic spec-driven-development packs that replace ADSK SDD
do_not_add.reason: Collides with first-party skills/spec-driven-workflow (trigger overlap + divergent paths/templates). Reviewed 2026-07-17; refreshed 2026-07-23: mattpocock renamed to-prd → to-spec (skills.sh may still list to-prd); to-spec → to-tickets → implement is a competing spine with tracker coupling — do not offer as an ADSK pack. Absorb useful patterns into ADSK SDD instead of vendoring; keep Superpowers writing-plans/TDD as the engineering-methods complement only.
notes: to-prd is conversation→ticket synthesis, not product-discovery PRD work — use product-value-loop for discover/prioritize/roadmap, ADSK SDD for executable engineering specs.
Do not ship the mattpocock suite (setup → to-spec → to-tickets → implement) as an ADSK optional pack.
absorbed_patterns: Human/self gates between specify → plan → implement
Reframe vague goals as measurable success criteria
Optional PRODUCT/TECH split for large features only
Sketch preferred test seams (highest useful existing boundary) before drafting when behavior is non-trivial
PRODUCT.md behavior as consumer-facing invariants; keep impl out of the product half

examples: other generic README authoring packs that replace ADSK readme-authoring
do_not_add.reason: Collides with first-party skills/readme-authoring (trigger overlap + divergent templates). Reviewed 2026-07-18: absorb audience/type templates + evidence-grounded sync into ADSK instead of vendoring.
absorbed_patterns: Task modes: create, add section, update/sync, review
Evidence discovery from manifests, entry points, examples, existing docs
No fabricated examples; public surface only
Human prose / anti-promotional tone without requiring a separate humanizer skill
